zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues III de Bourgogne於1148年7月11日出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬時，他的父親Eudes II de Bourgogne30歲，母親Marie de Blois-Champagne19歲。他於1165年與Alix de Lorraine結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1189年登記服兵役。他去世於1192年8月25日在巴勒斯坦享年44歲，埋葬在法國布格o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues III de Bourgogne于1148年7月11日出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬时，他的父亲Eudes II de Bourgogne30岁，母亲Marie de Blois-Champagne19岁。他于1165年与Alix de Lorraine结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1189年登记服兵役。他去世于1192年8月25日在巴勒斯坦享年44岁，埋葬在法国布格o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues III de Bourgogne was born on 11 July 1148, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Eudes II de Bourgogne, was 30 and his mother, Marie de Blois-Champagne, was 19. He married Alix de Lorraine in 1165. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1189. He died on 25 August 1192, in Palestine, at the age of 44, and was buried in Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues III de Bourgogne est né le 11 juillet 1148, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Eudes II de Bourgogne, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Marie de Blois-Champagne, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alix de Lorraine en 1165. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1189. Il est décédé le 25 août 1192, à Palestine, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues III de Bourgogne am 11. Juli 1148 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes II de Bourgogne 30 und seine Mutter Marie de Blois-Champagne 19. Er hat 1165 Alix de Lorraine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1189 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 25. August 1192 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Palästina und wurde in Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Alix de Lorraine nel 1165. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1189. Morì il 25 agosto 1192, nel Palestina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues III de Bourgogneが1148年7月11日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルディジョンで生まれた時，父Eudes II de Bourgogneは30歳，母Marie de Blois-Champagneは19歳であった。1165年にAlix de Lorraineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1189年に兵役登録をした。彼は1192年8月25日にパレスチナで44歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルサイント-ニコラス-ルeス-クiテアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.lifeSummary: Hugues III de Bourgogne(이)가 1148년 7월 11일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 디조에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes II de Bourgogne(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie de Blois-Champagne(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1165년 Alix de Lorraine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1189년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1192년 8월 25일 팔레스타인에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 세인트-니콜라스-e스-ci테오스에 묻혔다.

pt.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues III de Bourgogne nasceu em 11 de julho de 1148, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Eudes II de Bourgogne, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Blois-Champagne, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix de Lorraine em 1165. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1189. Ele faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1192, em Palestina, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França.

ru.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues III de Bourgogne родился 11 июля 1148 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudes II de Bourgogne было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Blois-Champagne, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix de Lorraine в 1165 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. В 1189 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 25 августа 1192 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-николас-лeс-кiтокс, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues III de Bourgogne nació el 11 de julio de 1148, en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Eudes II de Bourgogne, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Marie de Blois-Champagne, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alix de Lorraine en 1165. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1189. Murió el 25 de agosto de 1192, en Palestina, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.
